title: Grilled Chive Cozy Fries
description: A delicious side dish featuring crispy fries topped with chives and a hint of grilled flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep fryer to 350°F (175°C).
Cut the potatoes into fry shapes. Soak in cold water for at least 30 minutes.
Drain the potatoes and pat dry with paper towels.
Fry the potatoes in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain the fries on paper towels.
Mix the chive and grilled flavor in a bowl.
Toss the fries in the bowl to coat.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
